channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
item.description:
📊 Score: 240 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products....

item.title: [2] [大V/权威] Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
item.description:
📊 Score: 185 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • 🏆S-Authority:sam altman(+100)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)

📄 Summary: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit....

item.title: [3] [大V/权威] Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race

📄 Summary: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs....
